title: Roasted Australian Artichokes with Robust Rub
description: A hearty and savory side dish featuring roasted Australian artichokes seasoned with a robust rub.
instructions: Rinse the artichokes under cold water, and pat them dry.
In a small bowl, mix the robust rub ingredients.
Rub the artichokes with olive oil, then sprinkle the rub evenly over them.
Place the artichokes on a baking sheet, and roast for 30-40 minutes.
Flip the artichokes halfway through the cooking time.
Check for tenderness by inserting a fork. If it's still firm, roast for an additional 10-15 minutes.
Remove from the oven, and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
